description_long: This is a small, single-story bakery building with a flat roof bordered by a bold red trim. The front facade features a central entrance flanked by two large windows, each topped with red-and-white striped awnings. Above the door is an oval sign reading 'Biscuiti', and potted plants are placed symmetrically on either side of the entrance. The side and rear walls are plain, with the left side displaying two planter boxes under a window and the right side showing a blue vending machine and a service door. The building sits on a green rectangular base, suggesting a lawn or sidewalk area, and the overall design is simple and modern with playful, clean lines.
description: A compact, modern bakery with a red-trimmed flat roof, striped awnings, and a central sign reading 'Biscuiti'. The facade is inviting with large windows, potted plants, and a green base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, two large windows with red-and-white awnings, the 'Biscuiti' sign, and potted plants flanking the door.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals two planter boxes beneath a window and the plain side wall, with the green base extending around the building.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain wall with a small hanging planter and the red roof trim, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: The right side view features a blue vending machine, a service door, and a small window, with the green base visible below.
attribute_storefront_signage: There is an oval sign above the entrance with the text 'Biscuiti' in a cursive font. The sign has a white background with a red border and is centrally placed above the door, providing clear bakery branding.
attribute_awning_with_bakery_branding: There are two red-and-white striped awnings above the front windows. The awnings are rectangular, made of fabric or similar material, and do not display any bakery branding, logos, or text.
attribute_architectural_style: The building features a simple, modern commercial style with clean lines, a flat roof, bold color accents, and minimal ornamentation.
